description_long: This is a quaint, medieval-inspired house with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in blue, shingle-like tiles. The exterior walls are constructed from gray stone blocks, reinforced with visible wooden beams and trim, giving it a rustic, timber-framed appearance. A prominent stone chimney rises from one side of the roof, suggesting a fireplace inside. The house features a small, protruding annex with its own matching roof and a single arched window, while the main structure has a larger arched window with decorative framing. The house sits on a grassy plot adorned with white flowers and a wooden barrel, enhancing its storybook charm. The overall design is compact, with a single story and a cozy, inviting look.
description: A compact, medieval-style stone and timber house with a steep blue gable roof, arched windows, and a stone chimney, set on a grassy plot with flowers and a barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the steep gable roof, timber framing, and stone walls, with the annex visible on the left.
description_view_1: Full side view highlighting the large blue shingle roof, stone chimney, and a single arched window in the stone wall.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the chimney in the foreground, timber framing, and the annex extending to the right.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the annex with its own small gable roof, a barrel, and a window, set against a grassy background with flowers.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door with a small overhang, no porch or steps, accented by timber framing.
